name: Killarney Cookies 'n' Mint Mousse
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Cookies 'n' Mint Chocolate (HERSHEY'S), broken into pieces
3 1/2 cups Non-dairy whipped topping (thawed and divided)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, combine candy pieces, marshmallows, and milk. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 1 minute; stir vigorously. If necessary, continue microwaving at HIGH for additional 30 seconds at a time until chocolate and marshmallows are melted when well stirred; allow to cool to room temperature.
2. Fold 2 cups whipped topping into the chocolate mixture until well blended. Spoon into dessert dishes. Cover; refrigerate for 2 hours or until set. Stir food color into remaining 1-1/2 cups whipped topping, if desired, and use as garnish. Makes 6 servings.
PARFAIT VARIATION: Prepare chocolate mixture as directed. Do not spoon into dishes. Alternately spoon the chocolate mixture and thin layers of remaining 1-1/2 cups whipped topping into parfait glasses. Cover; refrigerate until cold. Garnish as desired.
